info.title: TicketCraft API
info.description: HTTP JSON API used by the TicketCraft UI and integrators. Most write routes require `X-Jira-Email` and `X-Jira-Token`. Optional `X-Gemini-Model`, `X-Gemini-Temperature`, `X-Github-Token`, `X-Gitlab-Token` mirror the SPA. Admin routes still require the same headers (no separate admin token). Draft/history routes only require `X-Jira-Email`.

XJiraEmail.name: X-Jira-Email
XJiraEmail.description: Jira user email used for upstream Jira REST calls.

XGithubToken.name: X-Github-Token
XGithubToken.description: Personal access token for private GitHub repo context / MCP.

XGitlabToken.name: X-Gitlab-Token
XGitlabToken.description: Access token for private GitLab repos / MCP.

ApiSuccessGeneric.description: Responses use `{ success, data?, error? }`; types vary per route.

Ticket.description: Serialized Jira ticket. See ticketcraft-shared `Ticket` for full shapes.

HistorySnapshot.description: `HistorySnapshot` from ticketcraft-shared; must include `id` and `ticketKey` on save.

get.summary: Public server config for the browser client

Generate improved ticket (Gemini / optional Cursor + MCP enrichment)

Summarize repo alignment for an improved ticket

200.description: Repo usage summary with field-level connections

post.summary: Fetch lightweight repo metadata for prompts
Upload text files (multipart form field `files`, up to 10)

get.summary: Load latest draft for this X-Jira-Email

post.summary: Scan Jira + process eligible tickets (server-side job)

get.summary: List pending automation results for user
List Cursor models for admin dropdown
